'''Outpost Cinder''' was an [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] outpost base located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bid'jerma]]. It was established on a ridge overlooking the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[Bid'jerma Detention Block]], in an effort to liberate the high concentration of Alliance prisoners at the facility. Outpost Cinder was established by [[Team Razor]] and staffed by [[Team Blade]], commanded by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Teracca Torrh]].<ref name="HS" />
